package rulecoverage

func NegativeRequestDtoOutsideTransportPackage() string {
    ruleID := "request_dto_outside_transport_package"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Request binding structs that live in repositories or service packages instead of transport-facing packages."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
